products.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_pkey ON public.products USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_sku_unique ON public.products USING btree (sku)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_slug_unique ON public.products USING btree (slug)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_category_id ON public.products USING btree (category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_account_id ON public.products USING btree (account_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_created_at ON public.products USING btree (created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_price ON public.products USING btree (price)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_flags ON public.products USING btree (account_id, is_featured, is_new)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_acc_date ON public.products USING btree (account_id, created_at, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_name_trgm ON public.products USING gin (immutable_unaccent((name)::text) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_sku_trgm ON public.products USING gin (immutable_unaccent((sku)::text) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE INDEX products_inventory_import_starred_idx ON public.products USING btree (inventory_import_starred)

product_attribute_values.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_attribute_values_pkey ON public.product_attribute_values USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_attribute_values_product_id_attribute_id_unique ON public.product_attribute_values USING btree (product_id, attribute_id)

product_images.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_images_pkey ON public.product_images USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_img_product_id ON public.product_images USING btree (product_id)
